data.name: Office Harasser - Sell your girls!
data.detailed_description:
About the plot:

You are a rich attractive young man who has already succeeded in corrupting all his female employees.
Now an appointee of your family is about to carry out an inspection of your company's performance.
All well and good, except that the inspector is your most hated cousin.
Will you be able to dodge this stray bullet using your beautiful girls?
Each one has her own character and not all of them may want to help you.
Use them all you want or send them to bribe the inspector, the choice is yours!
Over 40 animations, movies, music and sounds for you to enjoy 8 different endings.
Have fun!

About the content:

The game is a NSFW choice based visual novel. You can choose how to develop the story by the different choices included in the game.

- male protagonist
- 1000+ images
- 15+ animations
- 10000+ words
- multiple endings available
data.about_the_game:

- male protagonist
- 1000+ images
- 15+ animations
- 10000+ words
- multiple endings available
data.short_description: Do you want the thrill of being able to choose which of your employees to sell? Do you want to use them as objects, or treat them properly? Either way you will need their help to succeed in overcoming the crisis that looms over your company. Play the game and choose!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 900 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 900 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • Storage: 900 MB available space
